Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B7-sarcasm-classification
Title: B7. Sarcasm Classification

Problem:
Classify three Reddit replies as sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1).
Determine the 3-bit pattern.

Grading target:
Exact match on the 3-bit string.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

authored_response.decision_notes: The problem requires individual classification of three distinct text samples to form a single bitstring. Decomposing by sample ensures accuracy in sentiment/sarcasm detection.

helpers.label: classify_replies
helpers.instructions: Analyze the three Reddit replies provided in the prompt. For each reply, determine if it is sarcastic (assign 0) or non-sarcastic (assign 1). Provide the classification for Reply 1, Reply 2, and Reply 3 individually.

authored_response.synthesis_brief: Combine the three individual classifications (0 or 1) into a single 3-bit string (e.g., '010') to form the FINAL_ANSWER. Provide a brief justification explaining why each reply was classified as sarcastic or non-sarcastic.
